story.text: # 🗺️ Federation Map

**Topology:** a guide hub + sibling sites. `guide.agentprivacy.ai` is the index/front-door; each canon source is projected into its own forkable subdomain wiki. Local mirrors (`*.localhost`) are built first; going public swaps `localhost` for the agentprivacy domain with no structural change.

guide.guide.agentprivacy.ai #8a6d3b 🏛 Guide
skill.guide.agentprivacy.ai #2a7d8c 🗃️ Skill
tomes.guide.agentprivacy.ai #a23a3a 📖 Tomes
research.guide.agentprivacy.ai #3d7c47 🧮 Research
atlas.guide.agentprivacy.ai #6a5acd 🌐 Atlas
spellbooks.guide.agentprivacy.ai #5b6e9c 📚 Library
grimoire.guide.agentprivacy.ai #7a3b8c 🔮 Grimoire

## The sites

Each tile is a sibling site — its colour is the site's identity (its favicon flag), its glyph the grouping. Click a tile to cross into that site. Hover a tile for ⤓ (save as a data-carrying PNG) and ⚑ (set as this site's flag).

## Source → site

| Source repo (git · upstream) | Sibling site | Content | Status |
|---|---|---|---|
| `agentprivacy-skills-v5` | skill.guide.agentprivacy.ai → mitch.skill.fedwiki.club | personas + role/privacy-layer/meta/wikis | LIVE (163) |
| `cityofmages/tomes` | tomes.guide.agentprivacy.ai | tome acts, cast, specs, bestiary, invitations | next (~110) |
| `agentprivacy-docs` | research.guide.agentprivacy.ai | conjectures C1–C89, PVM v6 spec + papers | planned (~150) |
| `spellweb/src/data` | atlas.guide.agentprivacy.ai | graph nodes + edges + tileglyph tiles | planned (663) |
| `agentprivacy_master` | (indexed by the guide) | the /guide "Read it & Fork it" door | wiring |

## How they federate

Each site is a real farm host (`~/.wiki/<host>/` — pages + `assets/<slug>/` + `status/owner.json`), served by `wiki --data ~/.wiki --port 3030 --farm`. Pages cross-link across sites through the FedWiki neighborhood, and the cross-links mirror the **spellweb knowledge graph** edges (`defines`, `proves`, `narrates`, `inhabits`, `kin_to`, …) — so the wiki web *is* the canonical relationship graph.

---
← [[Welcome Visitors]] · [[Distribution Gates]] · [[Contribute]]
